SEARCH
Package io.github.simplejdbcmapper.core

Class SimpleJdbcMapperUtils

java.lang.Object
io.github.simplejdbcmapper.core.SimpleJdbcMapperUtils
public class SimpleJdbcMapperUtils extends Object
Some utility methods.
Author:
Antony Joseph

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> List<List<T>>
    chunkList(List<T> list, int chunkSize)
    Splits the list into multiple lists by chunk size.
    static <T, U> void
    populateHasMany(List<T> mainObjList, List<U> relatedObjList, String mainObjJoinPropertyNameTheId, String relatedObjJoinPropertyNameTheForeignKey, String mainObjHasManyPropertyName)
    Assigns the 'hasMany' property of the main object with the list of related objects that match 'mainObjJoinPropertyNameTheId' and 'relatedObjJoinPropertyNameTheForeignKey'.
    static <T, U> void
    populateHasOne(List<T> mainObjList, List<U> relatedObjList, String mainObjJoinPropertyNameTheForeignKey, String relatedObjJoinPropertyNameTheId, String mainObjHasOnePropertyName)
    Assigns the 'hasOne' property of the main object with the related object that matches 'relatedObjJoinPropertyNameTheId' and 'mainObjJoinPropertyNameTheForeignKey'.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • populateHasOne

      public static <T, U> void populateHasOne(List<T> mainObjList, List<U> relatedObjList, String mainObjJoinPropertyNameTheForeignKey, String relatedObjJoinPropertyNameTheId, String mainObjHasOnePropertyName)
      Assigns the 'hasOne' property of the main object with the related object that matches 'relatedObjJoinPropertyNameTheId' and 'mainObjJoinPropertyNameTheForeignKey'. 
       Example use case: 
 1) Query for a list of employees
 2) Query the departments for these employees. (Could use sjm.findByPropertyValues() for this)
 3) Use populateHasOne() to populate the employee.department property
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of main object list
      U - the type of related object list
      Parameters:
      mainObjList - The main object list whose 'hasOne' property that needs to be populated
      relatedObjList - the related object list
      mainObjJoinPropertyNameTheForeignKey - The property name on main object used to find the match. This will be the foreign key property name
      relatedObjJoinPropertyNameTheId - The property name on related object used to find the match. This will be the id of the related object.
      mainObjHasOnePropertyName - The main object 'hasOne' property to populate

    • populateHasMany

      public static <T, U> void populateHasMany(List<T> mainObjList, List<U> relatedObjList, String mainObjJoinPropertyNameTheId, String relatedObjJoinPropertyNameTheForeignKey, String mainObjHasManyPropertyName)
      Assigns the 'hasMany' property of the main object with the list of related objects that match 'mainObjJoinPropertyNameTheId' and 'relatedObjJoinPropertyNameTheForeignKey'. 
       Example use case could be: 
 1) Query to get a list of employees
 2) Query the skills of these employees. (Could use sjm.findByPropertyValues() for this)
 3) Use populateHasMany() to populate the employee.skills property
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of main object list
      U - the type of related object list
      Parameters:
      mainObjList - The main object list whose 'hasMany' property that needs to be populated
      relatedObjList - the related object list
      mainObjJoinPropertyNameTheId - The property name on main object used to find the match. This will be the id of main object.
      relatedObjJoinPropertyNameTheForeignKey - The property name on related object used to find the match. This will be the foreign key property name
      mainObjHasManyPropertyName - The main object 'hasMany' collection property to populate

    • chunkList

      public static <T> List<List<T>> chunkList(List<T> list, int chunkSize)
      Splits the list into multiple lists by chunk size. Can be used to split the sql IN clauses since some databases have a limitation on 'IN' clause entries and size
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of list
      Parameters:
      list - the list to chunk
      chunkSize - The size of chunk
      Returns:
      Collection of lists broken down by chunkSize
